purpose: Add non-gating diagnostic decomposition without changing the frozen Atomic Claim prompt, control dataset, aggregation policy, or readiness thresholds.

diagnostics.description: For each frozen Claim Type, record gold support label versus predicted support label. This is a support-label confusion matrix conditioned on Claim Type, not a Claim Type classification score.
Record exact accuracy and observed-label macro recall separately for central and non-central material Claims.
Attribute Candidate outcomes to correct, claim_classification_error, aggregation_rule_error, mixed_error, segmentation_failure, or masked_claim_error.

attribution_policy.correct: Predicted Candidate equals expected Candidate and all matched Claim labels are correct.
attribution_policy.masked_claim_error: Predicted Candidate equals expected Candidate despite one or more Claim-label errors.
attribution_policy.claim_classification_error: Predicted Candidate is wrong, Claim labels contain errors, and gold Claim labels aggregate to the expected Candidate.
attribution_policy.aggregation_rule_error: All Claim labels are correct, but deterministic aggregation does not match the expected Candidate.
attribution_policy.mixed_error: Both Claim-label error and a gold-label aggregation mismatch are present.
attribution_policy.segmentation_failure: Required exact-span Claim alignment is unavailable, so attribution is not attempted.
